nasb.text: Then Saul clothed David with his garments and put a bronze helmet on his head, and he clothed him with armor.

esv.text: Then Saul clothed David with his armor. He put a helmet of bronze on his head and clothed him with a coat of mail,

cnv.text: 掃羅把自己的戰袍給大衛穿上，把銅盔戴在他的頭上，又給他穿上鎧甲。

ccb.text: 扫罗把自己的战袍给大卫穿上，又给他戴上自己的头盔，穿上自己的铠甲。
